pinpoint.inapptemplate.headerconfig.Alig.Docs: The text alignment of the title of the message. Acceptable values: `LEFT`, `CENTER`, `RIGHT`.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.headerconfig.Head.Docs: The title text of the in-app message.

pinpoint.inapptemplate.headerconfig.Text.Docs: The color of the title text, expressed as a hex color code (such as #000000 for black).
